creator: marcel@brickporch.com
text:
Created attachment 210001
output from ofwdump on thunderX

Attached output from ofwdump. The other command bails out with "Failed to Parse Tree".

The fun part of the ofwdump is probably:

# cat ofwdump.txt | grep xfi
            Node 0x408c: xfi00
            Node 0x40f0: xfi01
            Node 0x4154: xfi02
            Node 0x41b8: xfi03
          Node 0x46e4: xfi00
          Node 0x4728: xfi01
          Node 0x476c: xfi02
          Node 0x47b0: xfi03
